message:
fix: replace fixed sleep with port-availability polling in Start() (#3361) (#3388)

The 50ms sleep after shutting down the loading server was insufficient for the
OS to release the port on some systems, causing Fiber to fail to bind. Replace
with a poll loop that tries to listen on the port until it becomes available
(up to 3s timeout), eliminating the race condition.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
